017package org.apache.juneau.microservice.test;
018
019import java.lang.reflect.*;
020import java.net.*;
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
022import org.apache.juneau.test.junit.*;
023import org.apache.juneau.microservice.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.microservice.jetty.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.rest.client.*;
026import org.eclipse.jetty.server.*;
027import org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.*;
028
029/**
030 * JUnit 5 extension behind {@link MicroserviceTest @MicroserviceTest}: boots a whole
031 * {@link Microservice} (config + lifecycle + embedded Jetty on an ephemeral port) for the test class, with
032 * {@link org.apache.juneau.test.junit.TestBean @TestBean} mock-bean injection and convenience parameter resolution.
033 *
034 * <h5 class='topic'>Lifecycle (per class)</h5>
035 *
036 * <p>
037 * The microservice is built + {@link Microservice#start() started} once in {@code beforeAll} and
038 * {@link Microservice#stop() stopped} in {@code afterAll}. A fresh instance is booted per class and stopped
039 * cleanly &mdash; never reused, since {@code Microservice} restart is unsupported (the {@code stopped} flag is
040 * one-way, the bean store is closed, and each {@code start()} adds a JVM shutdown hook). The bound port is read
041 * from the live {@link ServerConnector} (never hard-coded), mirroring the established fixture pattern.
042 *
043 * <h5 class='topic'>Mock-bean injection</h5>
044 *
045 * <p>
046 * {@link org.apache.juneau.test.junit.TestBean @TestBean} declarations are discovered via
047 * {@link JuneauBeanStoreExtension#discoverOverrides(Object)}. <b>Mode INJECT</b> (the default) installs the
048 * overrides via {@code Microservice.Builder.overridingBeanStore(...)} <i>before</i> boot, so the service reads
049 * them from startup. <b>Mode OVERLAY</b> pushes the overrides onto the booted instance's bean store for the
050 * class duration and pops them in teardown.
051 *
052 * <h5 class='topic'>Parameter resolution</h5>
053 *
054 * <p>
055 * Resolves {@link RestClient} (bound to the booted root URL), {@link Microservice}, {@link WritableBeanStore},
056 * and the bound port ({@code int} / {@code Integer}) on test + lifecycle method parameters.
057 *
058 * @since 10.0.0
059 */
060@SuppressWarnings({
061   "resource"
062})
063public class MicroserviceExtension implements BeforeAllCallback, AfterAllCallback, ParameterResolver {
064
065   /** Default name of the optional {@code static Microservice.Builder} supplier method on the test class. */
066   public static final String BUILDER_SUPPLIER_METHOD = "microserviceBuilder";
067
068   private static final ExtensionContext.Namespace NAMESPACE = ExtensionContext.Namespace.create(MicroserviceExtension.class);
069   private static final String KEY_STATE = "state";
070
071   /** Per-class booted state. */
072   private static final class State {
073      Microservice microservice;
074      RestClient client;
075      URI rootUrl;
076      WritableBeanStore beanStore;
077      Snapshot overlaySnapshot;   // non-null when Mode OVERLAY was pushed
078   }
079
080   @Override /* BeforeAllCallback */
081   public void beforeAll(ExtensionContext context) throws Exception {
082      var testClass = context.getRequiredTestClass();
083      var ann = findAnnotation(testClass);
084
085      // Discover @TestBean overrides from the test class (static members participate at class-boot time).
086      var instance = instantiateForDiscovery(testClass);
087      var overrides = JuneauBeanStoreExtension.discoverOverrides(instance);
088
089      var builder = resolveBuilder(testClass, ann);
090
091      // The user's configurations come first (so @Bean Servlet methods are visible), then the ephemeral Jetty
092      // server (port 0), then JettyConfiguration wires the lifecycle. BeanStore returns the first registered
093      // match, so a user-supplied @Bean Server still wins.
094      builder.configurations(ann.configurations());
095      builder.configurations(EphemeralJettyServerConfig.class, JettyConfiguration.class);
096
097      var injecting = ! overrides.isEmpty() && overrides.mode() == Mode.INJECT;
098      if (injecting)
099         builder.overridingBeanStore(overrides.store());
100
101      var state = new State();
102      state.microservice = builder.build();
103      state.microservice.start();
104      state.beanStore = state.microservice.getBeanStore();
105      state.rootUrl = resolveRootUrl(state.microservice);
106      state.client = RestClient.builder().rootUrl(state.rootUrl.toString()).build();
107
108      // Mode OVERLAY: push the overrides onto the booted instance's bean store for the class duration.
109      if (! overrides.isEmpty() && overrides.mode() == Mode.OVERLAY)
110         state.overlaySnapshot = state.beanStore.pushOverlay(overrides.store());
111
112      context.getStore(NAMESPACE).put(KEY_STATE, state);
113   }
114
115   @Override /* AfterAllCallback */
116   public void afterAll(ExtensionContext context) {
117      var state = (State) context.getStore(NAMESPACE).remove(KEY_STATE);
118      if (state == null)
119         return;
120      try {
121         if (state.overlaySnapshot != null)
122            state.beanStore.popOverlay(state.overlaySnapshot);
123      } finally {
124         try {
125            if (state.client != null)
126               state.client.close();
127         } catch (Exception e) {  // HTT: RestClient.close() failure is not reproducible against the in-process JDK transport.
128            // Best-effort close; never mask teardown.
129         } finally {
130            if (state.microservice != null)
131               safeStop(state.microservice);
132         }
133      }
134   }
135
136   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
137   // ParameterResolver
138   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
139
140   @Override /* ParameterResolver */
141   public boolean supportsParameter(ParameterContext pc, ExtensionContext ec) {
142      var t = pc.getParameter().getType();
143      return t == RestClient.class || t == Microservice.class || t == WritableBeanStore.class
144         || t == int.class || t == Integer.class;
145   }
146
147   @Override /* ParameterResolver */
148   public Object resolveParameter(ParameterContext pc, ExtensionContext ec) {
149      var state = readState(ec);
150      if (state == null)
151         throw new ParameterResolutionException("@MicroserviceTest has no booted microservice to resolve from.");
152      var t = pc.getParameter().getType();
153      if (t == RestClient.class)
154         return state.client;
155      if (t == Microservice.class)
156         return state.microservice;
157      if (t == WritableBeanStore.class)
158         return state.beanStore;
159      if (t == int.class || t == Integer.class)
160         return state.rootUrl.getPort();
161      throw new ParameterResolutionException("Unsupported @MicroserviceTest parameter type: " + t.getName());
162   }
163
164   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
165   // Helpers
166   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
167
168   private static MicroserviceTest findAnnotation(Class<?> testClass) {
169      for (var c = testClass; c != null; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
170         var a = c.getAnnotation(MicroserviceTest.class);
171         if (a != null)
172            return a;
173      }
174      throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest annotation not found on " + testClass.getName());
175   }
176
177   @SuppressWarnings("java:S3011") // setAccessible required: builder supplier method may be package-private or private by test-class convention.
178   private static Microservice.Builder resolveBuilder(Class<?> testClass, MicroserviceTest ann) {
179      var m = findBuilderSupplier(testClass, ann.builderMethod());
180      if (m == null)
181         return Microservice.create();
182      try {
183         m.setAccessible(true);
184         var result = m.invoke(null);
185         if (! (result instanceof Microservice.Builder b))
186            throw new ExtensionContextException(
187               "@MicroserviceTest builder method '" + ann.builderMethod() + "' on " + testClass.getName()
188               + " must return a Microservice.Builder.");
189         return b;
190      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException e) {
191         throw new ExtensionContextException(
192            "Failed to invoke @MicroserviceTest builder method '" + ann.builderMethod() + "' on " + testClass.getName(), e);
193      }
194   }
195
196   private static Method findBuilderSupplier(Class<?> testClass, String name) {
197      for (var c = testClass; c != null; c = c.getSuperclass()) {
198         try {
199            var m = c.getDeclaredMethod(name);
200            if (Modifier.isStatic(m.getModifiers()))
201               return m;
202            throw new ExtensionContextException(
203               "@MicroserviceTest builder method '" + name + "' on " + c.getName() + " must be static.");
204         } catch (NoSuchMethodException e) {
205            // Try the superclass.
206         }
207      }
208      return null;
209   }
210
211   /**
212    * Instantiates the test class via its no-arg constructor purely to drive {@code @TestBean} discovery (which
213    * reads instance + static members). Falls back to a hierarchy-static-only scan if no usable no-arg ctor exists.
214    */
215   @SuppressWarnings("java:S3011") // setAccessible required: test class no-arg constructor may be package-private for JUnit lifecycle reasons.
216   private static Object instantiateForDiscovery(Class<?> testClass) {
217      try {
218         var ctor = testClass.getDeclaredConstructor();
219         ctor.setAccessible(true);
220         return ctor.newInstance();
221      } catch (ReflectiveOperationException e) {
222         // No accessible no-arg ctor (e.g. @TestInstance(PER_CLASS) with constructor injection). Static-only
223         // @TestBean discovery still works via a throwaway minimal instance of Object's identity is impossible,
224         // so re-raise with guidance.
225         throw new ExtensionContextException(
226            "@MicroserviceTest requires a no-arg constructor on " + testClass.getName()
227            + " to discover @TestBean overrides before boot.", e);
228      }
229   }
230
231   private static URI resolveRootUrl(Microservice microservice) {
232      var component = microservice.getBeanStore().getBean(JettyServerComponent.class).orElseThrow(
233         () -> new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest could not find a JettyServerComponent after start()."));
234      var server = component.getServer();
235      var localPort = -1;
236      for (var c : server.getConnectors()) {
237         if (c instanceof ServerConnector sc) {
238            localPort = sc.getLocalPort();
239            break;
240         }
241      }
242      if (localPort <= 0)
243         throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest could not determine the bound ServerConnector port after start().");
244      return URI.create("http://localhost:" + localPort);
245   }
246
247   private static void safeStop(Microservice microservice) {
248      try {
249         microservice.stop();
250      } catch (Exception e) {  // HTT: Microservice.stop() failure mid-teardown is not reproducible in the happy-path test boot.
251         throw new ExtensionContextException("@MicroserviceTest failed to stop the microservice.", e);
252      }
253   }
254
255   private static State readState(ExtensionContext context) {
256      for (var c = context; c != null; c = c.getParent().orElse(null)) {
257         var s = (State) c.getStore(NAMESPACE).get(KEY_STATE);
258         if (s != null)
259            return s;
260      }
261      return null;
262   }
263}
